name: Hit 'Em Straight Indoor Golf
about: Hit 'Em Straight Indoor Golf is an indoor golf simulator facility in Bentonville, Arkansas. It utilizes a state-of-the-art golf simulator system to provide players with realistic gameplay on world-famous courses. The venue offers a range of booking options, including public play by the half hour and discounted punch passes for frequent players. Each bay can accommodate up to four players and is suitable for golfers of all levels, from beginners to serious players. The facility also hosts leagues, clinics, and events, and includes amenities such as a pro shop and a snack selection.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible booking options including punch passes for significant savings
Bay can accommodate up to 4 players for group play
Hosts leagues and events for community engagement

food_and_drink.notes: Carries an assortment of snacks (e.g., chips, candy bars, and nuts). Customers are welcome to bring in food or have it delivered.
No alcohol is mentioned as being available for purchase on-site.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue expects players to use their own clubs; no club rentals are offered.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring your food and drinks. The venue also carries an assortment of snacks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, one person takes about one hour to play 18 holes, so you should plan your booking accordingly.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, it can accommodate families, with a maximum of 10 people allowed in a bay.
